pages.title: Island Faction
pages.text: Eastern lamellar and wanderer mystic. Forty-two ultra-hard recipes. Claim with $(l:factions/overview)/cabafaction claim island$(/l).

pages.title: Ronin armor sets
pages.text: $(bold)Bamboo Hat$(/) — the iconic kasa.$(br2)$(bold)Japanese Light Armor$(/) (Do-maru), $(bold)O-Yoroi$(/), $(bold)Raijin$(/).$(br2)Fantasy: $(bold)Ronin$(/) set.

pages.title: Wanderer armor sets
pages.text: $(bold)Thief, Wandering Wizard, Wind Worshipper, Forgotten Trace, Evening Ghost.$(/) Each is helmet, chestplate, leggings, boots.

pages.title: Katana-family weapons
pages.text: $(bold)Wakizashi, Black Katana, Nagakiba, Marai Executioner Sword.$(/)$(br2)$(bold)Thief Dagger, Wandering Wizard Sword, Forgotten Trace Spear.$(/)
